headline: Barclays Maintains Underweight on Enphase Energy, Lowers Price Target to $31
summary: Barclays  analyst Christine Cho   maintains Enphase Energy (NASDAQ:ENPH) with a Underweight and lowers the price target from $35 to $31.

headline: Enphase: Do Not Bottom-Fish Here - More Recovery Headwinds Ahead
summary: Enphase's healthy net cash position and asset-light model temper risks, yet their return prospects remain subpar without clearer demand recovery signals. Learn more about ENPH stock here.
